description: Configure the Wazuh manager to ingest and analyze custom DNS logs from /var/log/custom_dns.log based on the format found in /home/ga/dns_sample_data.log. Create a custom decoder named 'custom-dns' in local_decoder.xml to extract 'srcip' and 'domain' fields. Implement a detection rule (ID 100050, level 12) in local_rules.xml that triggers when the 'domain' field exceeds 60 characters. Ensure the configuration is active and verified.
